description: FileChanged is not a recognized hook event per conventions §7; the hot-cache line-count monitoring hook will silently never fire.
suggested_fix: Rename FileChanged to a supported event such as PostToolUse with matcher targeting writes to hot-cache.md, or remove the stale entry.

description: CLAUDE.md has no section documenting how to run tests or validation checks for the library.
suggested_fix: Add a brief test section pointing to /seo:validate-library and /seo:contract-lint as the library's quality gates.

description: Required parameter alert_type has no empty-input handler; invoking /seo:setup-alert with no argument produces undefined behavior.
suggested_fix: Add a short clause: if no alert_type provided, list available types and prompt the user.

description: No error guidance for unrecognized alert type or non-numeric threshold value.
suggested_fix: Add: if alert_type is not one of the enumerated values, surface the valid list and stop.

description: Required parameter seed has no empty-input handler; invoking /seo:keyword-research with no argument produces undefined behavior.
suggested_fix: Add a clause: if seed is omitted, prompt the user for a topic before proceeding.

description: No error handling for bad or empty competitor domain input.
suggested_fix: Add: if competitors= value cannot be parsed as domain(s), warn and proceed without gap analysis.

description: No error paths for unreadable SKILL.md files or failed shasum comparison.
suggested_fix: Add: if a SKILL.md file cannot be read, mark that skill FAIL with reason in the summary table.

description: Both domain and project parameters are optional with no guidance when neither is supplied.
suggested_fix: Add a clause: if neither domain nor project is provided, prompt the user to specify one.

description: No error handling when memory/wiki/<slug>/index.md is missing for a named project.
suggested_fix: Add: if project slug index not found, surface the error and suggest running /seo:wiki-lint.

description: Required parameters topic and keyword have no empty-input handler.
suggested_fix: Add a clause: if topic or keyword is missing, prompt the user before proceeding.

description: No error paths documented in the workflow body.
suggested_fix: Add a brief note on what to do if the GEO optimization pass cannot be applied.

description: No error handling for missing memory/geo-feedback/ directory or records with no prior queries.
suggested_fix: Add: if memory/geo-feedback/ is absent, explain the prerequisite and stop gracefully.

description: Required parameter target has no empty-input handler.
suggested_fix: Add a clause: if no URL or domain is provided, prompt the user.

description: No error handling for unreachable URL or WebFetch failure.
suggested_fix: Add: if WebFetch returns an error, note the failure and proceed with available data.

description: Required parameter schema_type has no empty-input handler.
suggested_fix: Add a clause: if schema_type is omitted, list available types and prompt.

description: No error handling for unavailable source URL or malformed content input.
suggested_fix: Add: if URL is not fetchable, ask user to paste content instead.

description: Required parameter domain has no empty-input handler.
suggested_fix: Add a clause: if no domain is provided, prompt the user.

description: No error paths documented in the workflow body.
suggested_fix: Add brief error guidance for cases where the domain is unreachable or unknown.

description: Required parameter source has no empty-input handler.
suggested_fix: Add a clause: if no URL or content is provided, prompt the user.

description: No error handling for inaccessible URL passed to WebFetch.
suggested_fix: Add: if URL cannot be fetched, ask user to paste the page content directly.

description: Required parameter source has no empty-input handler.
suggested_fix: Add a clause: if no URL or page details are provided, prompt the user.

description: No error paths documented in the workflow body.
suggested_fix: Add brief error guidance for cases where current meta tags cannot be retrieved.

description: Multi-step evaluation procedure is written as a bullet list rather than numbered steps.
suggested_fix: Rewrite the Evaluation Procedure section as a numbered list (1. Read files, 2. Count records, 3. Compare to threshold, 4. Write report).

description: No error handling for missing memory/audits/ directory or no audits found.
suggested_fix: Add: if memory/audits/ is empty or absent, report UNMET for all items and note the missing data source.

description: Multi-check workflow is organized as prose subsections rather than numbered steps.
suggested_fix: Add a numbered Workflow section (1. Read files, 2. Run Runbook drift checks, 3. Run handoff schema checks, 4. Run jargon leak checks, 5. Write report).

description: No error handling for missing auditor SKILL.md files or absent references/auditor-runbook.md.
suggested_fix: Add: if a required file is missing, fail fast with a clear message naming the missing file.

description: No error handling for missing memory/wiki/ directory or empty memory store.
suggested_fix: Add: if memory/wiki/ is absent, report no wiki to lint and suggest running memory-management first.

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' used in 'For each relevant category' without measurable selection criteria.
suggested_fix: Replace with 'For each of the following categories' since the categories are explicitly enumerated immediately after.
